atomic_facts.fact: The text 'ORDER NOW $999.95' is displayed in large pink font at the top right.

The address '1 KRIS KRINGLE DR NORTH POLE, CA 99705' is listed.
A disclaimer states 'Please Allow 600-800 Years for Shipping'.
The website 'NORTHPOLE.COM' is displayed in white text on a purple banner.
The phone number '1-800-SLP-OVER' is displayed at the bottom.
In the second frame, the girls are holding red and white candy canes.

ocr: You must be like around 10 years old to order.
All Sales are Final. Refunds? Don't even ask.
